description:
Build the static HTML documentation site(s) from the Diataxis markdown using 
the md-to-html skill. Mirrors the source tree: diataxis/maintainer/ -> 
docs/maintainer/ and/or diataxis/user/ -> docs/user/, plus a docs/index.html 
landing page (per ADR flowdoc-yuw, the built site lands in docs/, the 
GitHub-Pages convention, once the legacy archive frees it). Standalone 
capability; pour it after a diataxis-generate or diataxis-maintain pass. Run 
via 'bd mol pour diataxis-html --var target=both|maintainer|user'.

target.description: both = build maintainer (diataxis/maintainer/->docs/maintainer/) and user (diataxis/user/->docs/user/); maintainer or user = build just one.

steps.title: Diataxis: build HTML site ({{target}})
steps.description:
Umbrella for building the static HTML doc site(s) from the Diataxis markdown.
target = {{target}}. One authored child does the build. Source of truth for
layout: ADR flowdoc-yuw (diataxis/ source -> docs/ output, mirrored tree).

steps.title: Diataxis: convert markdown docs to the static HTML site ({{target}})
steps.description:
BUILD the HTML site(s) from the Diataxis markdown using the md-to-html skill
(skills/md-to-html/). target = {{target}}. Encodes ADR flowdoc-yuw §6
(HTML output location).

1. Read skills/md-to-html/SKILL.md for the exact build commands and options.
2. If target is 'maintainer' or 'both': convert diataxis/maintainer/ ->
   docs/maintainer/, mirroring the four Diataxis type folders
   (tutorials/ how-to/ reference/ explanation/) plus index.md. Carry over
   mermaid rendering, callouts, the per-type/section index pages, and style.css.
3. If target is 'user' or 'both': convert diataxis/user/ -> docs/user/ the
   same way.
4. Build/refresh the top-level docs/index.html landing page linking the
   site(s) (maintainer and/or user, per target).
5. EXCLUDE working/authoring files from the published site: any underscore-
   prefixed file — _Manifest.md (_Manifest), _UpdateQueue.md (_UpdateQueue),
   _AuditLog.md (_AuditLog), _DiataxisGuide.md — must NOT produce HTML output.
6. Verify: every published markdown source has a matching .html output,
   internal links resolve in HTML, the docs/ tree mirrors diataxis/ (minus the
   excluded working files), and no _Manifest/_UpdateQueue/_AuditLog working
   files leak into the published site.

READ-ONLY source markdown under diataxis/. Output only under docs/. Do NOT
close any bead yourself — the LLM judges close it.
